constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may contribute proposal language but remains non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates evaluation evidence and records proposal-only artifacts.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not improvement authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Improvement proposal created and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Improvement Proposal Runtime creates proposal-only artifacts.
Improvement Review Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from improvement proposals is not implemented.
Reflection, self-improvement, and self-application remain out of scope.
